name: karabiner-config-builder
description: A TypeScript builder for generating karabiner.json.

scripts.update:patch: npm run patch && npm run check && npm run build && npm run repack
scripts.update:minor: npm run minor && npm run check && npm run build && npm run repack
scripts.smoke: npm run check && npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js --help
scripts.smoke:init: npm run smoke:reset && HOME=/tmp/kcb-smoke-home node dist/cli/index.js init /tmp/kcb-smoke-workspace && HOME=/tmp/kcb-smoke-home node dist/cli/index.js config list
scripts.smoke:build: npm run smoke:reset && HOME=/tmp/kcb-smoke-home node dist/cli/index.js init /tmp/kcb-smoke-workspace && HOME=/tmp/kcb-smoke-home node dist/cli/index.js build > /tmp/kcb-smoke-build.json
scripts.smoke:deploy: npm run smoke:reset && HOME=/tmp/kcb-smoke-home node dist/cli/index.js init /tmp/kcb-smoke-workspace && HOME=/tmp/kcb-smoke-home node dist/cli/index.js deploy --force --omit-backup
scripts.smoke:backup: npm run smoke:reset && HOME=/tmp/kcb-smoke-home node dist/cli/index.js init /tmp/kcb-smoke-workspace && HOME=/tmp/kcb-smoke-home node dist/cli/index.js deploy --force --omit-backup && HOME=/tmp/kcb-smoke-home node dist/cli/index.js backup create && HOME=/tmp/kcb-smoke-home node dist/cli/index.js backup list
scripts.smoke:restore: npm run smoke:reset && HOME=/tmp/kcb-smoke-home node dist/cli/index.js init /tmp/kcb-smoke-workspace && HOME=/tmp/kcb-smoke-home node dist/cli/index.js deploy --force --omit-backup && HOME=/tmp/kcb-smoke-home node dist/cli/index.js backup create && HOME=/tmp/kcb-smoke-home node dist/cli/index.js backup restore
scripts.smoke:all: npm run smoke && npm run smoke:init && npm run smoke:build && npm run smoke:deploy && npm run smoke:backup && npm run smoke:restore
scripts.repack: npm uninstall -g karabiner-config-builder && npm pack && npm install -g ./karabiner-config-builder-$npm_package_version.tgz && kcb config relink && rm karabiner-config-builder-$npm_package_version.tgz
